nasb.text: the one who says he abides in Him ought himself to walk in the same manner as He walked.

esv.text: whoever says he abides in him ought to walk in the same way in which he walked.

cnv.text: 凡說自己是住在他裡面的，就應該照著他所行的去行。

ccb.text: 所以，自称住在主里面的，就该在生活中效法基督。

csbs.text: 那说自己住在他里面的，自己也应该按基督所行的照样去行。
